ExternalServiceRegistration.label: NCinoBankingAdvisor
ExternalServiceRegistration.schema: {"serverDescriptor":{"protocolVersion":"2025-06-18","serverInfo":{"name":"NCinoBankingAdvisor","version":"1.0.0"}},"tools":[{"name":"get_client_financial_summary","description":"Retrieve a client's accounts, balances, net worth, and recent activity.","inputSchema":{"type":"object","properties":{"client_id":{"type":"string","description":"Client identifier, e.g. CLIENT-001 (Maria Chen), CLIENT-002 (David Okafor), CLIENT-003 (The Thompson Family)."}},"required":["client_id"]}},{"name":"recommend_banking_products","description":"Recommend banking products (loans, credit lines, savings) tailored to a client's profile.","inputSchema":{"type":"object","properties":{"client_id":{"type":"string","description":"Client identifier."}},"required":["client_id"]}},{"name":"get_loan_application_status","description":"Get the status of a client's loan or deal in the nCino lending pipeline.","inputSchema":{"type":"object","properties":{"client_id":{"type":"string","description":"Client identifier."}},"required":["client_id"]}},{"name":"get_current_rates_and_eligibility","description":"Look up current product rates and a quick eligibility/prequalification check for a client.","inputSchema":{"type":"object","properties":{"client_id":{"type":"string","description":"Client identifier."}},"required":["client_id"]}}],"resources":[]}
